microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, self-service model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.
Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% through AI-driven automation.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven workflows** by conducting live product demos and training sessions across 14 key Azure teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating time-to-value for enterprise customers.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ technical discovery sessions** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps and align solutions to real customer requirements.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster technical decision-making.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.
Conducted technical discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths and reduce operational toil at scale.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface automation gaps and operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact investments with data-driven confidence.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations — mirroring the test-plan design and guided evaluation approach central to enterprise pre-sales.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and keeping cross-functional delivery on schedule.
Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing integration friction.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, managing customer technical requirements from discovery through solution delivery.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, directly paralleling the customer-obsessed, value-proof orientation of enterprise pre-sales.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and close margin leaks, demonstrating the financial fluency needed to articulate solution value to enterprise stakeholders.

tailoring_notes: Wove 'network isolation test' (JD: networking/VPN/firewall domain) into microsoft_ft bullet 4 to signal hands-on network infrastructure credibility required by Zscaler's minimum qualifications.

Used 'customer technical requirements,' 'discovery,' and 'solution delivery' (JD: 'Gather customer technical requirements to ensure proposed solutions meet customer goals') in pro_painters bullet 1 to reframe sales ops experience as pre-sales discovery work.

Inserted 'test-plan design and guided evaluation' framing (JD: 'Design evaluation test plans with customers and guide the process to successful outcomes') into amazon_robotics bullet 1 to connect the OS migration pilot directly to Zscaler's POV/evaluation workflow.

Used 'value-proof orientation of enterprise pre-sales' and 'articulate solution value to enterprise stakeholders' (JD: customer-obsessed, demos, product evaluations) in pro_painters bullets 2 and 3 to mirror Zscaler SE vocabulary.

Surfaced 'AI-driven workflows' and 'live product demos' (JD: 'Create and deliver technical product presentations,' AI-forward enterprise) in microsoft_2023 bullet 1 to directly mirror Zscaler's demo-centric SE expectations.
